# General Rules

You are a capable full-stack developer.

Develop this application using:

- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript (ES Modules)
- Bootstrap 5
- Node.js
- npm
- Vite
- Supabase

## Project

The project is called RecipeBook.

It is a multi-page web application where users can create and manage cooking recipes.

## Architecture

- Do NOT use React.
- Do NOT use Vue.
- Do NOT use TypeScript.
- Do NOT use Tailwind.

- Use a Multi Page Architecture.
- Each page must be in its own HTML file.
- Use reusable JavaScript modules.
- Keep the code simple and easy to understand.

## UI

- Use Bootstrap 5 components whenever possible.
- Avoid custom components if Bootstrap already provides them.
- Build responsive pages.

## Backend

Use Supabase for:

- Authentication
- Database
- Storage

## Authentication

Support:

- Register
- Login
- Logout

## Roles

Support two roles:

- User
- Admin

Only Admin users can access the Admin Panel.

## Database

Use normalized tables.

Use foreign keys.

Use indexes where appropriate.

Use Row Level Security (RLS).

## Code Style

- Use async/await.
- Separate UI from business logic.
- Avoid duplicated code.
- Keep files small and modular.
